methodology.traffic_measurement: Royal Road does not expose homepage visit counts; section residence and position are used as organic exposure proxies.
methodology.residence: Interval-censored between consecutive samples; reported as lower, upper and midpoint estimates.
methodology.causality: Correlations are descriptive and do not establish that exposure caused traction.
